title: Moving of Monday docs

posts.author: rosaly (Rose @ Sayn)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to add the feature to move a stand alone Monday doc into a board rather than workspace or folder. What if I created a doc that doesn’t need to be updated but it now should live inside a board. Is there a way to add that feature rather than me copying and pasting and losing the date of when I created the doc.
